title: Whipped French Chocolate Mousse
description: A silky, airy mousse made with rich dark chocolate and frothy coconut cream, finished with a subtle hint of vanilla for a truly indulgent treat.
instructions: Place the chopped chocolate in a heatproof bowl over a pot of simmering water, stirring until completely melted.
Remove bowl from heat and stir in the coconut sugar, vanilla extract, and a pinch of sea salt until smooth.
Let the chocolate mixture cool to room temperature, then fold in the chilled coconut milk until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a jar and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to thicken.
Whip the chilled coconut cream with a hand mixer until soft peaks form.
Gently fold the whipped coconut cream into the chilled chocolate mixture until light and airy.
Spoon the mousse into serving glasses and chill for another 15 minutes.
Garnish with a sprinkle of cocoa powder or chopped nuts before serving.
